message:
feat(lab): add PromotedExplorationScenario and schedule promotion pipeline

Extend the dual-run infrastructure with exploration-to-regression
promotion:

- dual_run.rs (+332 lines): Introduce PromotedExplorationScenario
  struct for replayable differential scenarios promoted from schedule
  exploration output. Carries DualRunScenarioIdentity, representative
  replay seed, canonical trace fingerprint, schedule hash, original
  and violation seeds, violation summaries, class/source run counts,
  optional source artifact path, and description. Includes repro_command(),
  with_source_artifact_path(), and lab_replay_metadata() methods.
  Also adds promote_exploration_report() function that collapses an
  ExplorationReport into promoted scenarios grouped by trace fingerprint
  class, selecting representative seeds and preserving violation evidence.

- mod.rs: Re-export PromotedExplorationScenario and
  promote_exploration_report from the lab public API.

- tests/lab_differential_schedule_promotion.rs: New test exercising
  the full promotion pipeline — constructs an ExplorationReport,
  promotes it, and verifies that promoted scenarios carry correct
  identity, seed selection, violation summaries, and class counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
